headline: American Express Named the Official Payments Partner of the National Football League
summary: NEW YORK, March 30, 2026--American Express and the National Football League today announced a multi-year global partnership naming American Express the NFL’s Official Payments Partner, beginning with the 2026 NFL season.

headline: From Amex to DTCC: Ripple Is Re-Engineering Wall Street Post-Trade Infrastructure

headline: Credit card annual fees are soaring past $800. Here’s why people keep paying them—even as perks are harder to come by
summary: Shoppers and travelings keep gravitating to premium 'lifestyle' cards, but interest rates and reward restrictions can trap unwary consumers.

headline: Amex Exploration Receives Key Permits for Perron Bulk Sample and Completes Financial Guarantee Requirement
summary: Montreal, Quebec--(Newsfile Corp. - March 30, 2026) - Amex Exploration Inc. (TSXV: AMX) (FSE: MX0) (OTCQX: AMXEF) ("Amex" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that it has obtained the main required governmental authorizations for the execution of its 40,000 tonne underground bulk sampling program at the Perron gold project, located within the locality of Valcanton, near Normétal. Field preparatory work is planned to begin during the month of April, with the objective of initiating portal...
